name: f6-heartbeat-stale-propagation
title: F6 heartbeat and stale propagation across assignment consumers
description: trellis_agent_heartbeat command (5s throttle); 30s Tokio background scanner marks runs stale after 90s + emits trellis.agent.stale (60s throttle); splitter dispatch loop calls heartbeat every 30s; frontend list passes staleAfterMs default and renders stale UI.
